title: Founders Don’t Get Stable Conditions
summary: An entrepreneurship-focused channel called EO (Entrepreneur & Opportunities) publishes content about founder stories and challenges. The title asserts that founders operate without stable conditions, suggesting a commentary on entrepreneurial uncertainty and volatility.
